title: LiDAR-based Camera Autofocus System
description: A custom autofocus system for a Sony a6700 camera using a DToF LiDAR sensor, ESP32, and WiFi communication with FreeRTOS. Implemented advanced filtering techniques and reverse-engineered Sony's communication protocol to enable reliable autofocus. Employed RTOS-compliant practices for task management, synchronization, and resource optimization.

title: Custom Flight Computer
description: Designed and tested a 4-layer STM32-based flight computer PCB in KiCad for a competition rocket. Responsible for microcontroller interfacing, sensor integration, and power management. Defined SPI, UART, and I2C communication protocols for data transfer between components and other subsystems.

title: Closed-Course Autonomous RC Car
description: An autonomous RC car that navigates walled courses and overtakes competitors without human intervention. Integrated TFLuna LiDAR and IR sensors for obstacle detection, implemented PD control loops for motor and steering actuation, and coordinated communication between dual microcontrollers via a custom CAN network.

title: Fully-Pipelined LC-3 Processor Simulation
description: A 5-stage pipelined software simulation of the LC-3 microprocessor architecture, accurately modeling clock-cycle timing and state transitions. Implemented data and control hazard handling through data-forwarding and intelligent stalling to ensure correct instruction execution.

title: Microcontroller Video Game: Zelda Recreation
description: A recreation of The Legend of Zelda on a microcontroller-based system with 2700+ lines of custom C++ code. Designed and interfaced all hardware and software components including custom graphics drivers and PCB layout. Won 1st place in class-wide competition.

title: Custom Electric Longboard
description: A fully custom-built electric longboard with integrated battery, electronic speed controller, and motor. Designed mechanical layout, ensured component compatibility, optimized solder joints, and 3D-modeled and printed a hardware enclosure. Performed rigorous testing to ensure efficiency, reliability, and safety.
